title: Warm Apple Pudding with Caramelized German Apple
description: A moist and velvety dessert that combines the flavors of apple with a hint of German spice.

ingredients.name: german apple spice
ingredients.notes: Available at most German import stores

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples into 1-inch thick wedges.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, sugar, and German apple spice. Toss until the apples are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, heavy cream, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Pour the wet ingredients over the apple mixture and stir until the apples are well coated.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the apples are tender and the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
